theme-1.name: Tiki
theme-1.description: Tropical moonlit beach with carved tiki totems
theme-1.motifs: Tiki masks, bamboo, palm trees, tropical flowers
theme-1.blockMotifs: Carved tiki mask faces, bamboo weave patterns, tropical flower motifs
theme-1.scene: Tropical moonlit beach at night, carved tiki totems, palm trees silhouetted, gentle waves
theme-1.loadingScene: Close-up of a carved tiki mask with glowing eyes, surrounded by tropical flowers
theme-1.gridMaterial: Weathered bamboo planks with rope lashing

music.menu: A laid-back tropical lo-fi instrumental with soft ukulele fingerpicking over warm steel drum chords and gentle bongo percussion. Light marimba accents shimmer through a haze of ocean breeze ambience. Around 95 BPM, calming and inviting.
music.gameplay: An upbeat island funk instrumental driven by a playful ukulele riff and tight djembe percussion. Kalimba runs sparkle over a steel drum melody. Around 115 BPM, focused and rhythmic.

theme-2.name: Cosmic
theme-2.description: Synthwave alien landscape with cratered planets and neon rim-lighting
theme-2.motifs: Crystals, nebula swirls, alien glyphs, planets
theme-2.blockMotifs: Cosmic crystal formations, nebula swirl patterns, alien glyph carvings
theme-2.scene: Synthwave alien landscape, cratered planets, neon rim-lighting
theme-2.loadingScene: A swirling nebula with crystal formations floating in deep space
theme-2.gridMaterial: Dark crystalline surface with faint nebula glow

music.menu: A dreamy space ambient instrumental with lush analog synth pads. A gentle arpeggiator twinkles over soft sub-bass warmth. Around 80 BPM, retro-futuristic and serene.
music.gameplay: A mid-tempo synthwave instrumental with a pulsing bassline under shimmering arpeggiated synths and crisp electronic drums. Around 110 BPM, propulsive and luminous.

theme-3.name: Easter Island
theme-3.description: Mysterious volcanic island with ancient stone guardians
theme-3.blockMotifs: Stone moai faces, volcanic rock patterns, petroglyph carvings
blockDesigns: A stoic forward-facing moai head with closed eyes, weathered mossy stone texture
A stern moai head with deep eye sockets looking slightly left, ocean-worn stone with teal lichen
A fierce moai head with open mouth and bared teeth, dark volcanic basalt with magenta mineral veins
A wise elder moai head with elongated features and a pukao (topknot hat), sandy weathered stone with ochre patina
theme-3.scene: Volcanic island at night, moai silhouettes, bioluminescent pools
theme-3.loadingScene: A single moai statue face emerging from volcanic mist, bioluminescent glow
theme-3.gridMaterial: Dark volcanic basalt with faint glow veins

music.menu: A mysterious retro-futuristic instrumental blending ancient atmosphere with neon synthwave. A haunting stone flute melody over warm analog synth pads. Around 85 BPM, otherworldly and contemplative.
music.gameplay: A driving retro synthwave instrumental with punchy bass synth over tight electronic drums and bright neon arpeggios in a minor key. 118 BPM, neon noir tension.

theme-4.name: Maya
theme-4.description: Ancient jungle temple civilization with jade and gold
theme-4.motifs: Jade serpents, stepped pyramids, feathered motifs
theme-4.blockMotifs: Jade serpent glyphs, stepped pyramid patterns, feathered serpent motifs
theme-4.scene: Deep jungle, stepped temple, jade canopy, misty waterfalls
theme-4.loadingScene: Jade serpent carving on a moss-covered temple wall, golden light filtering through
theme-4.gridMaterial: Deep ocean-floor stone with turquoise tint

music.menu: An atmospheric Mesoamerican instrumental with a wooden pan flute melody over gentle rain stick textures and soft clay drum rhythm. Around 85 BPM, mysterious but inviting.
music.gameplay: An energetic Latin world music instrumental driven by quick wooden marimba patterns and rattling seed shakers over tight hand drum rhythms. 120 BPM, ritualistic yet playful.

theme-5.name: Cyberpunk
theme-5.description: Enchanted ancient forest with golden mystical light
theme-5.motifs: Leaf veins, bark rings, glowing runes, moss
theme-5.blockMotifs: Leaf veins, bark rings, moss patches, glowing runes
theme-5.scene: Forest clearing at golden hour, towering trees with moss
theme-5.loadingScene: Ancient tree trunk close-up with glowing runes and bark patterns

music.menu: A moody cyberpunk instrumental with warm detuned analog synth chords and slow jazzy electric piano over a laid-back hip-hop beat. Around 80 BPM, noir and nocturnal.
music.gameplay: A slick cyberpunk electronic instrumental with a driving bassline, crisp trap hi-hats, and glitchy arpeggiated synths. 120 BPM, focused and calculated.

theme-6.name: Medieval
theme-6.description: Stone castle courtyard with torchlit walls and iron gates
theme-6.motifs: Shield crests, iron rivets, stone bricks, torch flames, heraldic lions, sword motifs
theme-6.blockMotifs: Shield crests, iron rivets, stone brick patterns
theme-6.scene: Castle courtyard at sunset, torches, towers, iron portcullis
theme-6.loadingScene: Torchlit stone wall with a shield and crossed swords, warm firelight

music.menu: A warm medieval tavern instrumental with gentle lute fingerpicking and a soft hurdy-gurdy drone. Celtic harp arpeggios add magic. Around 90 BPM, nostalgic and comforting.
music.gameplay: An upbeat medieval folk rock instrumental with lively lute strumming and bright tin whistle melody. 125 BPM, spirited and adventurous.

theme-7.name: Ancient Egypt
theme-7.description: Golden pyramids at dusk with hieroglyph-covered obelisks
theme-7.motifs: Hieroglyphs, scarab beetles, Eye of Horus, lotus flowers, ankh symbols, papyrus scrolls
theme-7.blockMotifs: Hieroglyphs, scarab beetles, lotus flower carvings
theme-7.scene: Desert twilight, golden pyramids, obelisks, Nile reflection
theme-7.loadingScene: Hieroglyph-covered wall with Eye of Horus, golden torchlight
theme-7.gridMaterial: Cool blue-grey slate with gold hieroglyph inlays

music.menu: An elegant Egyptian instrumental with a soft oud melody and gentle darbuka hand drum pattern. Arabic maqam Hijaz scale. Around 85 BPM, regal and serene.
music.gameplay: A rhythmic Egyptian fusion instrumental with driving darbuka and riq tambourine groove over punchy bass oud. 115 BPM, focused and exotic.

theme-8.name: Volcano
theme-8.description: Volcanic forge with rivers of lava and obsidian pillars
theme-8.motifs: Lava cracks, obsidian shards, ember glow, volcanic vents, magma flows, basalt columns
theme-8.blockMotifs: Obsidian shards, lava crack patterns, ember glow veins
theme-8.scene: Volcanic forge interior, rivers of lava flowing between obsidian platforms, ember-filled sky, basalt columns
theme-8.loadingScene: Obsidian rock face with molten lava cracks glowing orange-red
theme-8.gridMaterial: Cracked obsidian with faint ember glow between fissures

music.menu: A dark volcanic ambient instrumental with deep rumbling sub-bass. Slow metallic percussion — anvil strikes and chain rattles. Around 75 BPM, ominous but hypnotic.
music.gameplay: A driving industrial metal instrumental with heavy bass pulse and metallic percussion. 125 BPM, relentless forward momentum.

theme-9.name: Tribal
theme-9.description: Earthy savanna ritual grounds with painted stones and drums
theme-9.motifs: Painted patterns, drum motifs, feather marks, bone beads, ritual masks, cave paintings
theme-9.blockMotifs: Painted tribal patterns, drum circle motifs, feather marks
theme-9.scene: Savanna dawn, ritual stone circle, wildflowers, acacia trees
theme-9.loadingScene: Painted ritual drum surrounded by feathers and wildflowers, warm earth tones
theme-9.gridMaterial: Rose-tinted clay with faint handprint texture

music.menu: A warm organic tribal instrumental with soft djembe hand drumming and gentle kalimba melody. Around 90 BPM, earthy and grounding.
music.gameplay: A groovy Afrobeat instrumental with tight djembe and dunun in polyrhythmic lockstep. Funky kalimba riffs. 120 BPM, joyful and rhythmic.

theme-10.name: Arctic
theme-10.description: Frozen tundra under aurora borealis with steampunk brass structures
theme-10.motifs: Ice crystals, brass gears, copper pipes, snowflakes, aurora waves, frozen clockwork
theme-10.blockMotifs: Brass gear faces, copper pipe rivets, frozen clockwork
theme-10.scene: Frozen tundra, aurora borealis, ice crystals, brass structures
theme-10.loadingScene: Ice crystal formation with aurora light refracting through, brass gears embedded
theme-10.gridMaterial: Dark worn leather with brass patina rivets

music.menu: A serene arctic ambient instrumental with crystalline bell tones and a soft bowed string drone under sparse piano melody. Around 75 BPM, vast and frozen.
music.gameplay: A crisp Nordic folk electronic instrumental with staccato strings and tight electronic drums. Bright folk fiddle melody. 115 BPM, determined and brisk.
